welcome.title: Welcome to TechFlow
welcome.subtitle: Let's get your workspace set up in a few quick steps.

profile.title: Set up your profile
profile.description: Add your name and photo so your team knows who you are.

project.title: Create your first workspace
project.description: Workspaces help you organize tasks, files, and conversations.

invite.title: Invite your team
invite.description: Add team members by email. You can always do this later.

completion.title: You're all set!
completion.description: Your project is ready. Start adding tasks and collaborating with your team.
